unassigned_stints.stint_id: Maasdorp, C. G___Cape of Good Hope___1888
unassigned_stints.reason: Both biographies in this case are duplicates of one person (see duplicate_bio_groups), so the instructions forbid assigning the contested stint to either. Additionally, the dossier notes this stint is gate-compatible with biography 'maasdorp_christian-george_e1878' outside this case, 'already linked elsewhere or filtered' — that correctly-spelled bio is the natural holder, and assigning here risks a duplicate/false merge.

Same duplicate-bio situation: contested between two bios that are the same person, so assigned to neither. The stint's content (Additional Judge of Appeal 1912; Judge President, Cape Provincial Division 1914) matches the 1923 MAASDORF entry's later career ('judge of sup. ct., Union of S. Africa, 1910; ordinary judge of appeal, Oct., 1914'), but the out-of-case bio 'maasdorp_christian-george_e1878' is also gate-compatible and already linked elsewhere; resolving this requires merging the duplicate bios first, not picking one arbitrarily.

notes: The two biographies are OCR variants of the same person (MAASDORP, Christian George): identical forenames, identical opening clause 'Atty.-gen., Transvaal, Sept., 1878', resignation in Jan. (1879 vs 1880, one digit apart), and puisne judge, supreme court, Cape in Nov. (1879 vs 1885, one digit apart); the 1923 entry simply extends the career to the Union of South Africa bench. Surnames AASDORP and MAASDORF are both single-character mangles of MAASDORP, and both passed the fuzzy surname gate against the stint name 'Maasdorp, C. G'. The two stints themselves form one continuous, historically coherent judicial career (Puisne Judge, Eastern Districts Court 1888-1894; Supreme Court 1896-1909; Appellate Division/Judge President 1912-1914) consistent with the merged biography, and would be strong 'certain' links to the merged person — but a third, correctly-spelled biography 'maasdorp_christian-george_e1878' outside this case is gate-compatible with both stints and already linked elsewhere. Recommend the reviewer merge all three bio records and then attach both stints to the merged identity.
